name: barwise-vscode
description: ORM 2 modeling tool for data engineers and architects
author: Gabe Schenz

viewsWelcome.contents:
No ORM model loaded.

Open an .orm.yaml file to see the model structure.
[Open File](command:workbench.action.files.openFile)

barwise.llmProvider.description: LLM provider for transcript extraction. 'copilot' uses your GitHub Copilot subscription (no API key needed). 'anthropic' uses the Anthropic API directly.

barwise.anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key (only used when llmProvider is 'anthropic'). Leave empty to use the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable.

barwise.anthropicModel.description: Anthropic model ID (only used when llmProvider is 'anthropic').

barwise.copilotModelFamily.description: Copilot model family to prefer (e.g. 'gpt-4o', 'claude-sonnet'). Leave empty to use the default available model.

barwise.verboseLogging.description: Log detailed LLM interaction data (prompt length, raw response, token usage, latency) to the output channel.

barwise.enableMcpServer.description: Enable the built-in MCP server. When enabled, barwise ORM tools (validation, verbalization, schema generation, diagram, diff, merge, transcript import) are available to Copilot Chat and other MCP-aware AI tools.

chatParticipants.name: barwise
chatParticipants.description: ORM 2 data modeling expert -- import transcripts, validate models, generate schemas and diagrams

commands.name: import
commands.description: Import a transcript into an ORM model

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Merge an incoming model into a base model

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export model to DDL, OpenAPI, dbt, or Avro

commands.name: query
commands.description: Run a deterministic symbolic query against a model

commands.name: import-model
commands.description: Import model from DDL or OpenAPI

commands.name: review
commands.description: LLM-powered semantic review of a model

commands.name: impact
commands.description: Analyze impact of changing a model element

languageModelTools.name: barwise_validate_model
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Validate an ORM 2 model. Returns structured diagnostics including errors and warnings with rule IDs. If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_verbalize_model
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate FORML natural-language readings for fact types and constraints in an ORM 2 model. Produces human-readable sentences describing each fact type and its constraints. If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

factType.description: Specific fact type name to verbalize. Omit to verbalize all fact types.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_generate_schema
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate a relational schema from an ORM 2 model. Maps object types and fact types to tables, columns, and keys. Output can be DDL SQL or JSON mapping. If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

format.description: Output format: 'ddl' for CREATE TABLE SQL statements, 'json' for the relational mapping as JSON. Defaults to 'ddl'.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_diff_models
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Compare two ORM 2 models and return the structural deltas. Shows added, removed, and modified elements with breaking-level indicators (safe, caution, breaking). If no base is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

base.description: File path to the base (original) .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

incoming.description: Inline YAML for the incoming (changed) model

languageModelTools.name: barwise_generate_diagram
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate an SVG diagram from an ORM 2 model. Returns SVG markup showing object types, fact types, constraints, and their relationships. If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_import_transcript
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Process a business domain transcript through LLM extraction to produce a formal ORM 2 model in YAML. Uses the configured LLM provider (Copilot by default, no API key needed). If an .orm.yaml file is open in the editor, existing model types are provided as context so the LLM reuses them instead of redefining them.

transcript.description: The transcript text content, or a file path to a text/markdown file containing the transcript

modelName.description: Name for the resulting ORM model. Defaults to 'Extracted Model'.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_merge_models
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Merge an incoming ORM model into a base model. Accepts all additions and modifications, rejects removals. Returns the merged model as YAML with validation results. If base is a file path, the merged result is written back to disk. If no base is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

base.description: File path to the base .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

incoming.description: Inline YAML for the incoming model fragment to merge in

languageModelTools.name: barwise_export_model
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Export an ORM 2 model to a specified format (ddl, openapi, dbt, avro). Returns the exported artifact as text. If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

format.description: Export format: 'ddl' for SQL DDL, 'openapi' for OpenAPI 3.x, 'dbt' for dbt model files, 'avro' for Avro schemas

annotate.description: Include TODO/NOTE annotations in output (default: true)

includeExamples.description: Include population examples in output (default: true)

strict.description: Refuse to export if model has validation errors (default: false)

languageModelTools.name: barwise_describe_domain
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Query an ORM 2 model for domain context: entity definitions, constraints, relationships, and business rules. Optionally focus on a specific entity, fact type, or constraint type. If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

focus.description: Optional focus: entity name, fact type name, or constraint type keyword (e.g., 'Patient', 'mandatory'). Omit for full summary.

includePopulations.description: Include population (example) data in the description (default: true)

filePath.description: Path to a generated artifact (e.g., DDL file). When provided, resolves through lineage to find the source model.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_query_model
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a deterministic symbolic query against an ORM 2 model. Answers precise structural questions without LLM inference: list entities/fact-types/constraints, describe one entity or fact type, find an entity's fact types or related entities, navigate subtype hierarchies, list mandatory roles, find the connection path between two entities, or get model statistics. Prefer this over guessing model structure. If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

query.description: Query DSL expression. Commands: entities [entity|value], fact-types [arity], constraints [type], entity <name>, fact-type <name>, fact-types-of <entity>, related-to <entity>, constraints-of <name>, subtypes-of <entity> [transitive], supertypes-of <entity> [transitive], mandatory-roles [entity], path <entityA> <entityB>, stats. Quote names with spaces, e.g. fact-type "Customer places Order".

languageModelTools.name: barwise_import_model
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Import an ORM model from a structured format (DDL SQL or OpenAPI spec). Performs deterministic parsing to produce a draft ORM model in YAML. Distinct from transcript import which uses LLM extraction.

source.description: Source content (inline SQL/OpenAPI) or file path to a DDL or OpenAPI file

format.description: Format of the source: 'ddl' for SQL DDL, 'openapi' for OpenAPI 3.x specs

modelName.description: Name for the resulting ORM model. Defaults to format-specific name.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_review_model
languageModelTools.modelDescription: LLM-powered semantic review of an ORM model. Provides suggestions about naming, completeness, normalization, constraints, and definitions. Distinct from validation (which checks structural rules) -- review gives subjective modeling advice. If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

focus.description: Focus on a specific entity or fact type name. Omit for full review.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_lineage_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Check staleness of exported artifacts by comparing the current model against the lineage manifest. Returns which artifacts are stale (out of date) vs fresh (up to date). If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_impact_analysis
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Analyze the impact of changing a model element. Given an element ID, returns which exported artifacts depend on that element and would need regeneration. If no source is provided, automatically uses the .orm.yaml file open in the editor.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file. Omit to use the currently open .orm.yaml file.

elementId.description: ID of the model element to analyze (entity, fact type, constraint, etc.)
